citation.description: AC is a mix of codebase and operator-attested evidence. Codebase: rebar.toml line 90 sets require_authenticated=true; reconcile-bridge.yml materializes REBAR_BOT_SIGNING_KEY; finalize_event in _seam.py is the unified signing seam. Operator-attested: story 79da closed with signed probe ticket 4c55 (local), story 4dc0 closed with CI run 29537136608 event 8b72ddf6 (verified), story 1a51 closed with Gerrit review-bot LINK signed+verified (494-series events); Gerrit-side classification: opcert-service NON-WRITING (REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=off), review-bot code_review artifacts GATE-EXEMPT, review-bot relates_to LINK IN-SCOPE+SIGNED.

criteria.criterion: With identity.require_authenticated = true, no writer surface fails — (a) local session/worktree, (b) GitHub Actions reconcile-bridge, (c) Gerrit side. rebar verify-identity exits 0; no CI job goes red; no write rejected.

citation.description: Regression test covers both directions (pre-boundary grandfathered, post-boundary enforced) via the config/env path. rebar.toml line 100 pins enforce_since=8dcef776c3dd9e68935b74b82137e1ffd8f04f10. Story 8d91 comment confirms CI verify-identity PASS on flip sha cb0f8ec3b with require_authenticated=true + anchor.

criteria.criterion: Pre-flip events are grandfathered — identity.enforce_since pinned to enforcement-cutover commit; rebar verify-identity over full history exits 0 with zero pre-boundary events flagged. Proof: synthetic UNSIGNED before boundary passes gate; unsigned/forged AFTER boundary FAILS.

citation.description: Stories 79da (local machine, SSM key to ~/.ssh/rebar-bot-signing-key + ~/.config/rebar/config.toml signing_key), 4dc0 (REBAR_BOT_SIGNING_KEY set from SSM, run 29537136608 signed), 1a51 (Gerrit review-bot SSM key via fetch-secrets.sh:98-124) all closed before story 8d39 flip. reconcile-bridge.yml lines 211-228 materialize key; verify-identity.yaml gating step uses no forced flags.

criteria.criterion: Signing is provisioned everywhere before the flip — every in-scope writer has a persistent signing key configured and has produced at least one steady-state signed event, done BEFORE require_authenticated is set true.

citation.description: rebar.toml [identity] block: require_authenticated=true (line 90) + enforce_since=8dcef776c3dd9e68935b74b82137e1ffd8f04f10 (line 100) in same file/change (Gerrit 759, merged as origin/main 8bb261c19). Story 8d39 comment attests: post-boundary unsigned event -> verify-identity exits 1; test_identity_txn_signing_heldout.py::test_unsignable_transition_is_refused_under_enforcement proves local write-gate refuses. test_identity_enforce_since_grandfather.py asserts boundary behavior.

criteria.criterion: The flip is atomic and enforcing — identity.require_authenticated = true and pinned enforce_since land in ONE change; after it, verify-identity demonstrably FAILS on a new in-scope unsigned/forged event.

citation.description: All 5 child stories confirmed closed via show_ticket: 79da-c7e4-8d7c-471d (closed), 4dc0-d003-c236-45de (closed), 1a51-b170-5168-46d2 (closed), 8d91-5103-ae1b-44a7 (closed), 8d39-85d7-8f34-45e6 (closed). Provisioning stories 79da/4dc0/1a51 have empty file_impact (operational, no code commit).

criteria.criterion: End-state: the epic's five child stories are all in status closed, and each of their changes is present on origin/main.

citation.description: Confirmed by stories 79da (local), 4dc0 (CI), 1a51 (Gerrit review-bot LINK). finalize_event in _seam.py is the shared signing seam all write paths route through (txn.py, delete.py, append_event). Operator-attested via per-story evidence with specific run IDs, event UUIDs, and verify-identity exit-0 results.

criteria.criterion: SUCCESS CRITERION: Every writer environment (this machine, GitHub Actions, Gerrit-side services) produces SIGNED events in steady state, confirmed by rebar verify-identity reporting them verified.

citation.description: Stories 79da, 4dc0, 1a51 (and 0ba4 txn signing fix) all closed before story 8d39 flip. Story 8d39 comment records the first PRE-FLIP GATE failure (correctly caught a concurrent agent on old build) and the subsequent clean re-run (0 unsigned non-SNAPSHOT) before submitting Gerrit change 759.

criteria.criterion: SUCCESS CRITERION: The rollout is sequenced safely — signing is confirmed on every surface BEFORE the enforcement flag is flipped.
